mapper.select: SELECT id, skill_id, version_no, package_checksum, package_size, file_count, installed_relative_path, manifest_json, skill_md_summary, status, created_by, created_at FROM runtime_skill_version WHERE skill_id = #{skillId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, skill_id, version_no, package_checksum, package_size, file_count, installed_relative_path, manifest_json, skill_md_summary, status, created_by, created_at FROM runtime_skill_version WHERE skill_id = #{skillId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_skill_version (id, skill_id, version_no, package_checksum, package_size, file_count, installed_relative_path, manifest_json, skill_md_summary, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{skillId}, #{versionNo}, #{packageChecksum}, #{packageSize}, #{fileCount}, #{installedRelativePath}, #{manifestJson}, #{skillMdSummary}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE runtime_skill_version SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
